finding: The Guaranty of Performance is disclosed in Item 21 (PDF page 65): 'ACS, as our parent, guarantees our performance of all obligations under each Subfranchise Rights Agreement we execute (Guaranty of Performance included in Exhibit F).' The Exhibit F cover page (PDF page 263) references it in the title but the actual guaranty document may be a separate instrument within the physical exhibit. The key operative content is: ACS guarantees AFI's performance of ALL obligations under each Subfranchise Rights Agreement. This is already captured in the canonical under item21_financial_statements.parent_guaranty.
